import { Observable } from '../Observable'; import { isFunction } from '../util/isFunction'; export function throwError(errorOrErrorFactory, scheduler) { const errorFactory = isFunction(errorOrErrorFactory) ? errorOrErrorFactory : () => errorOrErrorFactory; const init = (subscriber) => subscriber.error(errorFactory()); return new Observable(scheduler ? (subscriber) => scheduler.schedule(init, 0, subscriber) : init); } //# sourceMappingURL=throwError.js.map
